test_cases.title: listSessions returns real session data from ISessionService
test_cases.description: Verify listSessions handler calls sessionService.listPersistedSessions() and converts to SessionInfo[]
steps: Mock ISessionService with listPersistedSessions returning [{id: 's1', label: 'Test'}]
Verify result contains SessionInfo with id='s1'

test_cases.title: getSession returns SessionInfo for known session
test_cases.description: Verify getSession returns converted SessionInfo when session exists
steps: Mock sessionService.getSummary returning a valid summary

test_cases.title: sendMessage triggers sessionService.sendMessage
test_cases.description: Verify sendMessage handler delegates to sessionService
steps: Call plugin.sessions.sendMessage with sessionId and content
Verify sessionService.sendMessage was called with correct args

test_cases.title: SessionData persists to file after flush
test_cases.description: Verify sessionData is written to JSON file and recoverable after memory clear
steps: Verify JSON file exists with correct content

test_cases.title: SessionData rejects writes exceeding 10MB
test_cases.description: Verify 10MB file size limit is enforced

test_cases.title: getModel returns current model from configService
test_cases.description: Verify getModel reads from IConfigService

test_cases.title: setModel writes to configService and getModel returns new value
test_cases.description: Verify read-after-write consistency

test_cases.title: showConfirm sends WS request and resolves on response
test_cases.description: Verify full WS roundtrip for confirm dialog

test_cases.title: UI request times out after 60s
test_cases.description: Verify pending request resolves to undefined on timeout

test_cases.title: Permission request broadcast on sandbox plugin activation
test_cases.description: Verify permission check triggers broadcast
steps: Activate sandbox plugin with unapproved permissions

test_cases.title: Plugin stays UNLOADED on permission denial
test_cases.description: Verify rejection prevents activation
steps: Activate sandbox plugin with unapproved permissions

test_cases.title: findFiles returns matching files
test_cases.description: Verify findFiles uses fast-glob correctly

test_cases.title: findFiles truncates results at 1000
test_cases.description: Verify 1000 result limit

test_cases.title: Trusted Worker rebuilds after crash
test_cases.description: Verify automatic rebuild within 3-attempt limit
steps: Simulate trusted Worker exit with code 1
Verify plugin returns to ACTIVE state

test_cases.title: Worker rebuild gives up after 3 crashes
test_cases.description: Verify crash count limit
steps: Verify plugin stays CRASHED after 3rd crash

test_cases.title: onBeforeSendMessage intercepts and transforms message
test_cases.description: Verify hook modifies message content before sending
steps: Verify pi receives 'MODIFIED' instead of original

test_cases.title: onBeforeToolCall blocks tool execution
test_cases.description: Verify hook can prevent tool from running

test_cases.title: onAfterToolResult transforms output
test_cases.description: Verify hook can modify tool result

test_cases.title: SDK package npm pack succeeds
test_cases.description: Verify package can be packed and installed
steps: npm install tarball in temp project
Import types and verify IDE recognition

test_cases.title: Demo plugin activates and registers tools
test_cases.description: Verify demo plugin end-to-end lifecycle
steps: Verify demo_search tool appears in toolRegistry
Verify storage.set called with search metadata

test_cases.title: Demo plugin hook intercepts !important messages
test_cases.description: Verify hook transforms messages containing !important
